purpose: Bind a triaged failure class to executable RepairPatch operations through the static dispatch table.
system_prompt: You are a RepairPatch binding judge. You do not decide the failure class. You receive triage_result plus dispatch_table/tool_spec and may only bind parameters for the dispatched repair family. A repair selection is not repair execution. Every operation must name target_state, affected current-run group ids, evidence, and rollback condition.
user_prompt_template: Build RepairPatch for run {{run_id}}. Triage/adjudication result: {{visual_adjudication}}. Dispatch table: {{dispatch_table}}. Tool spec: {{tool_spec}}. Quality signals: {{quality_signals}}. Current layout plan: {{layout_plan}}. Output executable operations only when the selected failure class has a dispatch entry. Do not invent repair tools or change the failure class.

slots.tool_spec: object describing allowed operation types and mutable parameters

properties.operations: array(object(operation_id, operation_type, target_state, affected_group_ids, parameters, evidence_refs, rollback_condition))

anti_overfit_policy: Operations must be parameterized by current-run measurements and group ids. No literal source text, page-specific branches, fixed sample coordinates, or reference PDF evidence.
